name: rss-feed-test
description: Smoke-test for the v3 'rss' trigger. Import this workflow, then add an 'rss' trigger to it in the UI — import carries cron triggers only, not plugin triggers, so the trigger is added separately (suggested config in the chat / README of this sample). Each new feed item fires a run that POSTs the item to httpbin, so the execution detail shows the payload that flowed through.
